creator: swills@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 218981
patch to port

upower doesn't seem to need polkit any more:

https://cgit.freedesktop.org/upower/tree/NEWS#n164

https://cgit.freedesktop.org/upower/commit/?id=9a2b2633095fb901fc1931ab0c600392d68bb3b4

https://cgit.freedesktop.org/upower/commit/?id=bddc559713ed3e8d790231139b21c8277931b5d0

Seems to build fine without it. Not completely sure how to test.
